title: [V4-C1] MoodPredictor: replace LoRA on Ollama with implementable approach
description: MoodPredictor specifies LoRA adapter training on Qwen2.5-0.5B via PEFT, but 0.5B is served through Ollama (GGUF). Ollama has no training API and cannot load LoRA adapters. The entire MoodPredictor subsystem (§3.3.9 lines 2658-2711) is unimplementable as written.

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Replaced LoRA MoodPredictor with sklearn MLP ensemble. Updated: class docstring, __init__ (removed llm_router dep), predict() (sync, feature vector), retrain() (sklearn MLP training), config YAML (lora→mlp section), memory budget text, diagram, file paths (lora/→models/), SQLite (adapter_version→model_version, validation_loss→validation_mae), event payload (validation_mae), phase description, repo structure.

title: [V4-H1] embed_frame() return type: VisualEmbedding -> VisualEmbedding | None
description: embed_frame() declares return VisualEmbedding but returns None when CLIP unloaded. Must be VisualEmbedding | None for mypy --strict. §3.3.10 lines 3065-3069.
close_reason: Fixed: VisualEmbedding → VisualEmbedding | None in embed_frame(). Commit 9b7ce97

title: [OQ] Vision process, monitoring, IoT scope (#3, #5, #8)
description: Resolve Open Questions #3 (Vision: separate process vs asyncio thread), #5 (monitoring dashboard vs logs in early phases), #8 (Home Assistant in early phases). Scope/architecture decisions. Update RFC section 13.

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Resolved OQ #3 (Vision: single process, asyncio.to_thread + ThreadPoolExecutor), #5 (structlog + /metrics endpoint from Phase 1), #8 (No IoT early, SkillDomain later). Updated sections 2.3, 3.5.1, Phase 1, Phase 3, Phase 6. Commit 9867eac

title: Architecture patterns: EventBus catalog, config loading, error handling
description:
Three cross-cutting architecture patterns missing from RFC:
- G8/I2: EventBus event catalog — no formal schema/registry. Which events, who publishes/subscribes?
- G9/I3: Configuration loading order — multiple YAMLs, override precedence, env vars undefined
- G10/I4: Error handling strategy — no global pattern. Circuit breaker for Ollama, reconnect for WS, retry for SD
Covers: G8, G9, G10, I2, I3, I4

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Added 3 cross-cutting architecture specs. EventBus catalog (23 events, publishers/subscribers). ConfigLoader with 10-level precedence. Error handling: retry/circuit breaker/graceful degradation + per-component table + CircuitBreaker class. Marked G8, G9, G10, I2, I3, I4 as RESOLVED.

title: [V4-M4] Document SubconsciousLayer.post_process() embeddings dict key format
description: embeddings: dict[str, np.ndarray] — key semantics undefined. LatentAssociationEngine needs embedding_type to choose FAISS index. §3.3.11 line 3788.

title: [V4-H5] Subconscious opacity: enforce via architecture, not convention
description: ReflectionLoop 'has NO reference' to SubconsciousLayer, but all tables in same bob.db. ReflectionLoop has db_path and can query subconscious tables directly. §3.3.11 lines 3476, 3940.
close_reason: sc_ prefix + ScopedDBReader TABLE_ALLOWLIST. Runtime enforcement of subconscious isolation. Commit 62bc555

title: Sync PRD with RFC: resolve all divergences after RFC-VALIDATION epic
description: RFC was significantly expanded during epic bob-4ik (54 findings resolved, RFC grew from ~4044 to 6217 lines). PRD is now out of sync with RFC in multiple areas. Finding R1 from RFC-VALIDATION identified 12 specific sync issues. Task: audit PRD against current RFC, update PRD to match all architectural decisions, new sections, and changed concepts. Key areas: SkillDomain architecture (was flat Skills), Bootstrap/Setup, ClaudeCodeLock, RelationshipTracker + Exodus Mode, Update Mechanism, User Settings, Negotiation UX, LoRA/SD specifics (Fleischer style, mflux), AudioRouter, Tablet lifecycle, EventBus catalog, ConfigLoader, Error handling strategy, CapabilityDiscovery, Headless→Visual transition.

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: PRD synced with RFC. All 12 S-findings addressed: S1 (version v0.1.0), S2 (SkillDomain System), S3 (9-stage Genesis), S4 (AI-generated assets via SD), S5 (Godot Shell-Renderer two-layer arch), S6 (1930s Fleischer style), S7 (Bootstrap), S8 (ClaudeCodeLock), S9 (plugin architecture), S10 (domain-based repo structure), S11 (dev phases section added), S12 (open questions synced — 4 resolved, new added). Also added: RelationshipTracker, Exodus Mode, AudioRouter, UserSettings, CapabilityDiscovery, Headless→Visual transition, Update Mechanism. PRD: 322→369 lines. R1 marked RESOLVED in RFC-VALIDATION.md.

title: [OQ] Visual pipeline: consistency, segmentation, resolution (#29, #30, #31)
description: Resolve Open Questions #29 (visual consistency across AI-generated sprites), #30 (auto-segmentation — likely already resolved: per-part generation), #31 (optimal sprite resolution for tablet). Update RFC section 13.

title: [V4-H4] NightProcessor + InnerMonologue 0.5B contention during quiet hours
description: Both systems run 23:00-07:00 competing for 0.5B via Ollama. InnerMonologue LOW=15sec (~1920 calls/night). NightProcessor: 50 calls. Ollama serializes requests. No contention handling. §3.3.8, §3.3.11 lines 3686-3737.
close_reason: NightProcessor suspends InnerMonologue during run_nightly(). Commit 35c2cf4

title: imprint_weight integration spec
description:
AwakeningPhase.imprint_weight (2.0) is defined but no system references it:
- C6/I5: TasteEvolution, MoodEngine, ExperienceLog, ReflectionLoop don't use imprint_weight
- Need explicit integration points: which systems, how, when
Covers: C6, I5

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Added imprint_weight integration to 4 systems: TasteEvolution.reinforce(weight=), MoodEngine.process_event(imprint_weight=), ObjectExperience.imprint_active field, ReflectionLoop.reflect() awakening LLM context. Integration summary table in section 5.1.2. Marked C6 and I5 as RESOLVED.

title: [V4-M5] DiscoveredAxis.centroid: list[float] -> np.ndarray
description: All other embedding fields use np.ndarray. DiscoveredAxis.centroid uses list[float]. Inconsistent and inefficient. §3.3.9 line 2631.

title: [EPIC] Resolve all RFC-VALIDATION findings
description: Epic: resolve all 52 open findings from RFC-VALIDATION.md. Grouped into ~15 logical tasks. Each task: present problem → user chooses solution → fix RFC → update RFC-VALIDATION.md. PRD update deferred until RFC is finalized.

comments.author: v.zoologov

Key additions: SkillDomain architecture, Bootstrap/Setup, ClaudeCodeLock, Negotiation UX, RelationshipTracker, Exodus Mode, Update Mechanism, User Settings, LoRA/SD specifics, AudioRouter, Tablet lifecycle, EventBus catalog, ConfigLoader, Error handling. Open Questions expanded to #36. R1 (PRD sync) deferred to separate task.

title: [OQ] SkillDomain lifecycle: versioning, probation, conflicts (#25, #26, #27)
description: Resolve Open Questions #25 (SkillDomain versioning on upgrade), #26 (self-created SkillDomains probation period), #27 (SkillDomain dependency conflicts — two domains need same resource). Update RFC section 13.

title: Quick RFC fixes: naming, rate limits, whitelist, AssetGenerator location
description:
Batch of 5 small RFC fixes that don't need design decisions:
- C1/R2: Rename Genesis Stage 0 from BOOTSTRAP to CONSCIOUSNESS (avoid confusion with section 3.6 Bootstrap)
- C3/R5: Fix GenesisMode.run() docstring to match 9-stage narrative
- C7/R10: Rename rate limit keys from claude_api_calls to claude_code_invocations
- C8/R9: Add network whitelist for Telegram API + Open-Meteo to security config
- C9/R8: Move AssetGenerator from genesis/ to services/ in repo structure

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: All 5 quick fixes applied to RFC.md (5204→5236 lines, +32). Changes: (1) Genesis Stage 0 BOOTSTRAP→CONSCIOUSNESS in narrative + docstring, (2) GenesisMode.run() docstring rewritten to match all 9 stages, (3) Rate limit keys claude_api_calls→claude_code_invocations, (4) NETWORK_WHITELIST added to section 8.2 (open-meteo, telegram, localhost), (5) asset_generator.py moved from genesis/ to services/ in repo structure. RFC-VALIDATION.md updated: C1,C3,C7,C8,C9,R2,R5,R8,R9,R10 marked RESOLVED.

title: Design decision: Audio output routing
description:
Where does Bob's TTS audio play?
- G5: Options: tablet speaker, external speaker, Mac mini audio, configurable
- If Bob 'lives on tablet', voice should come from tablet. But headless mode?
Covers: G5

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Added AudioRouter class with 3 modes (tablet/local/both), fallback logic, PCM streaming over WebSocket to Godot AudioStreamPlayer. Config updated with format field. Marked G5 as RESOLVED.

title: [OQ] Fine-tune data strategy (#10)
description: Resolve Open Question #10: Is reflection data sufficient for LoRA fine-tune or is additional collection needed? Minimum ~100 pairs. Update RFC section 13.

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Resolved OQ #10 — organic data only, min_dataset_size 200, quality scoring added to finetune config. Commit a6ab188

title: [V4-H7] CrossDomainCorrelator: increase min_sample_count from 10 to 30+
description: Pearson correlation on n=10 with |r|>0.3 threshold produces spurious correlations. Statistical validity requires n>=30 minimum. §3.3.9 lines 2791-2857.
close_reason: min_sample_count 10→30 in dataclass, YAML, and docstring. Commit 1d1f059

title: [OQ] Book identity: references, re-reading, awakening UX (#19, #21, #22)
description: Resolve Open Questions #19 (book reference frequency, decrease over time?), #21 (Bob re-read book text vs book_quotes.yaml), #22 (awakening phase visualization: speech bubbles, confusion animations, or both). Update RFC section 13.

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Resolved OQ #19 (decreasing book_reference_probability via reflection), #21 (book_quotes.yaml sufficient, no RAG), #22 (thought bubbles + awakening animations). Added awakening config for bubbles/animations, updated evolution rules. Commit 54935d7

title: [V4-M7] Fix event payload key 'pattern summary' -> 'pattern_summary'
description: grounding.circadian_updated payload uses 'pattern summary' (with space). All other keys use underscores. Lines 3340, 7640.

title: [OQ] Animation primitives + Genesis testing (#12, #13)

title: Design decision: Headless → visual transition + peripheral addition
description:
What happens when user adds peripherals after Genesis:
- D5/F9/G3: If Genesis ran headless (no tablet), how does Bob retroactively get visual assets?
- Options: manual 'bob genesis --visual' / auto-detect tablet connection / offer visual Genesis
- Also: periodic peripheral re-scan or on-command only?
Covers: D5, F9, G3

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Added Headless→Visual Transition section. Auto-detect tablet via mDNS (every 5 min), offer VisualGenesis (Stages 3,6,7 only) via Telegram. Manual: bob visual-genesis. PeripheralScanner table for camera/mic (30 min re-scan). Marked D5, F9, G3 as RESOLVED.

title: [V4-M6] NightProcessor temperature: clarify range vs fixed value
description: Docstring says 'temperature (1.2-1.5)', config has fixed 1.3. Ambiguous — is there per-call randomization? §3.3.11 lines 3722, 3839.

title: Validate PRD and RFC for logical consistency

comments.author: v.zoologov

Analysis covers: 12 PRD↔RFC sync issues, 9 logical collisions within RFC, complete E2E user flow with 12 identified gaps, capability map by phase (0-6), 10 architectural gaps, 6 UX gaps, 5 technical gaps, open questions audit (PRD vs RFC), and 8 sections of recommendations. Total findings: 54. No architectural showstoppers found.

title: De-duplicate Claude Code permission model (sections 4.2.1 and 8.4)
description:
Claude Code permission model is described in two places with overlap:
- C5/R7: Section 4.2.1 has permission flow, degradation table, queue (QueuedClaudeTask, ClaudeCodeTaskQueue)
- Section 8.4 has ClaudeCodeLock class, permission protocol diagram, graceful interrupt, Negotiation Engine
- Both contain unique info AND duplicated permission flow diagram
Resolution: 4.2.1 = HOW Bob uses Claude Code (integration, fallbacks, queue). 8.4 = HOW access is secured (lock, detection, interrupt). Remove duplication, add cross-refs.
Covers: C5, R7

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: De-duplicated sections 4.2.1 and 8.4. Removed duplicated permission protocol diagram from 8.4, replaced with cross-ref. Removed duplicated config values from security.yaml. Added scope-split callout to 4.2.1. Marked C5 and R7 as RESOLVED.

title: Fix _generate_appearance() return format for AssetGenerator/Skeleton2D
description:
Current _generate_appearance() returns JSON for pre-built character system (body_type, hair). But with Skeleton2D + AI generation, it should return a description dict that AssetGenerator can consume.
- C4/R6: Update return format — describe WHAT Bob looks like (for LLM), not HOW to render
- Expected flow: _generate_appearance() → description dict → AssetGenerator.generate_avatar_parts() → Skeleton2D parts → Godot
Covers: C4, R6

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Updated _generate_appearance() return format from Godot-rendering JSON to description dict for AssetGenerator. Each key maps to Skeleton2D body part. Full flow documented: LLM → description → per-part SD generation → Godot. Marked C4 and R6 as RESOLVED.

title: [V4-H2] Add model_manager.profile_changed to Event Catalog
description: Event model_manager.profile_changed is used by AgentRuntime (line 872) and InnerMonologue (line 2556) but missing from Event Catalog §7.1. No publisher, payload, subscriber contract defined.
close_reason: Added model_manager.profile_changed to Event Catalog §7.1. Commit cf6987e

title: [V4-M3] HabituationEngine: use SelfImprovement API instead of direct SQL
description: HabituationEngine queries improvement_rules table directly — cross-module SQL from bob/mind/habituation.py to table owned by self_improve.py. Breaks Clean Architecture. §3.3.11 line 3656.

title: [V4-M2] ThoughtRingBuffer.max_age_sec: implement or remove
description: max_age_sec=300 accepted in constructor but never used for eviction. deque(maxlen) evicts by count only. Dead parameter. §3.3.8 lines 2366-2384.

title: [V4-H3] Unify VisionBridge vs VisionService naming
description: Event Catalog uses VisionBridge as publisher (7602-7604). §3.3.10 and class definition use VisionService (3060, 3415, 4541). Same component, two names.
close_reason: Unified VisionBridge→VisionService across all sections. Commit cf6987e

title: [V4-C2] AudioGrounding: replace Whisper hidden states with implementable approach
description: AudioGrounding.extract_prosody() requires whisper_hidden_states from encoder layers 4-6, but whisper.cpp (project STT engine) only returns text. No Python API for hidden states. §3.3.10 lines 3117-3143.

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Replaced Whisper hidden states with librosa DSP. Updated: class docstring, __init__ (removed voice_bridge dep, added sample_rate), extract_prosody() signature (audio+words instead of hidden_states), method descriptions (pyin/rms/VAD), YAML config (librosa_dsp method), integration point (VoiceBridge passes raw audio), memory table, architecture diagram, dev phases table.

title: [V4-C3] NORMAL profile memory budget: add CLIP to ModelManager lifecycle
description: CLIP (0.4GB) not in ModelManager profiles config. NORMAL profile at ~9.0 GB + CLIP pushes to ~9.4+ GB of 12.5 GB limit. No lifecycle management for CLIP loading/unloading. §3.3.10, §3.2.4 lines 893-916.

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Added optional_models to ModelManager profiles config. CLIP loaded opportunistically with min_headroom_mb=500 check. Unloaded in HEAVY_GEN. Integration point updated for graceful degradation.

title: Design decision: Bob's language
description:
Bob's language is undefined:
- D1/G4: TTS mentions Russian (Kokoro vs Piper), but all RFC examples are in English

- Affects: TTS engine choice, LLM prompts, SOUL.md, all dialogue examples
Covers: D1, G4

title: Post-Genesis UX: onboarding, settings, negotiation, updates
description:
UX gaps for normal operation after Genesis:

Covers: UX3, UX5, UX6, F12

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: All 4 findings resolved — F12 (update mechanism, section 3.8.3), UX3 (organic capability discovery via CapabilityDiscovery in 5.1.1), UX5 (user settings interface, section 3.8.4), UX6 (negotiation UX presentation 3.3.7.1 + RelationshipTracker 3.3.7.2 with Exodus Mode). Added Open Questions #33-#36 for RelationshipTracker design.

title: Genesis trigger mechanism + startup flow diagram
description:
Define how Bob starts and when Genesis triggers:
- F5: Genesis trigger mechanism undefined — how does 'bob start' decide Genesis vs Normal?
- I1: Add startup flow diagram showing: bob start → check SOUL.md → Genesis or Normal → event loop
Covers: F5, I1

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Added section 3.7 Startup Flow to RFC.md (5338→5424, +86 lines). Content: (1) ASCII flow diagram: bob start → bootstrap check → Genesis check → AgentRuntime, (2) main() entry point code showing the 3-step logic, (3) Restart behavior note — state persisted, no data loss. RFC-VALIDATION.md: F5 and I1 marked RESOLVED.

title: [OQ] Taste: axes count, CV emotions, phantom prefs (#14, #15, #20)
description: Resolve Open Questions #14 (optimal number of taste axes ~15?), #15 (CV-based user emotion detection as TasteEvolution signal — too invasive?), #20 (phantom preferences affect TasteEngine or remain separate). Update RFC section 13.

comments.author: v.zoologov
comments.text: COMPLETED: Resolved OQ #14 (keep ~30 axes, conviction+clusters protect from noise), #15 (no CV emotions, removed emotion_detected signal), #20 (phantom->taste one-directional bias at Genesis). Commit aea5df7

title: [DOC] ReSpeaker XVF3800 + OBSBOT Tiny 2: dev docs and Bob skill integration
description: Create development documentation for ReSpeaker XVF3800 and OBSBOT Tiny 2 hardware integration. Includes: (1) hardware capabilities and API docs, (2) Bob's skills for using these devices (audio direction, camera control, spatial tracking), (3) Open Question #4 (ReSpeaker DoA protocol — needs hardware testing). This task covers the 'wrapping' of these devices into Bob's skill system.

title: [V4-M1] Remove hardcoded db_path defaults from constructors
description: db_path: str = 'data/bob.db' hardcoded in multiple constructors. Fragile (CWD-dependent), violates DI. Should be injected without default.
